kbSources.name: databases.md
kbSources.content:
# Databases

PostgreSQL supports JSONB columns for semi-structured data.

MySQL uses InnoDB as its default storage engine.

SQLite is an embedded database that requires no server.

turns.content: What storage engine does MySQL use?

kbSources.name: deploy.md
kbSources.content:
# Deployment

For CPU-only environments, BM25 is recommended over dense retrieval.

Dense retrieval requires GPU for efficient inference.

BM25 has O(1) memory per query.

turns.content: We deploy on ARM CPUs with 4GB RAM.
Which retrieval method should we use?

kbSources.name: cooking.md
kbSources.content:
# Recipes

To make pasta, boil water and add salt.

Risotto requires constant stirring.

turns.content: What is the time complexity of quicksort?

kbSources.name: frontend.md
kbSources.content:
React uses a virtual DOM for efficient rendering.

Vue.js has a simpler learning curve than React.

kbSources.name: backend.md
kbSources.content:
Express.js is the most popular Node.js web framework.

Fastify is faster than Express for JSON serialization.

turns.content: Compare Express and Fastify for a Node.js API.

kbSources.name: algorithms.md
kbSources.content:
# Sorting

Quicksort has average O(n log n) time complexity.

Mergesort is stable and also O(n log n).

Bubblesort is O(n^2) and rarely used in practice.

turns.content: Care algoritm de sortare e cel mai rapid?

description: KB update — new content replaces old
Large document chunking — retrieves relevant chunk

kbSources.name: guide.md
kbSources.content:
# Chapter 1: Introduction

This guide covers deployment best practices.

# Chapter 2: Networking

Use a VPC with private subnets for database instances.

Never expose database ports to the public internet.

# Chapter 3: Monitoring

Use Prometheus for metrics collection.

Grafana provides dashboards for visualization.

# Chapter 4: Security

Rotate credentials every 90 days.

Use IAM roles instead of access keys.

turns.content: How should I handle database networking?

kbSources.name: rules.md
kbSources.content:
# Access Rules

Admin users can access all resources.

Regular users can only access their own resources.

Guest users have read-only access to public resources.

kbSources.name: specs.md
kbSources.content:
The maximum upload size is 10MB.

The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute.
